title: Specialist impl declaration
description: Formal schema for a specialist impl provision per D19 (specialist kind). Specialists are packaged role/skill bundles loaded into a workspace's substrate via the `skills` capability (D17). Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., supported-work-unit-kinds resolve to registered kinds; required adapter bindings exist in workspace) is out of scope per D28.

roles.description: Shape-role-tags this specialist operates in (D19), per D13's role vocabulary. Required slot; may be [] (per D13 required-with-explicit-empty pattern).

skills.description: Operations the specialist provides (D19). Semantic declarations only; formal interface and content (e.g., SKILL.md) = layer 3 / specialist-impl. Required slot; may be [].

publicly-exposed.description: Per D21 — exposure flag for workspace-as-A2A-peer / workspace-as-MCP-server scenarios. Default semantics deferred to layer-3 follow-on; schema admits the slot.

supported-work-unit-kinds.description: Which work-unit-kinds this specialist is appropriate for (D19). Open vocabulary; values are extension-registered work-unit-kinds (fully-qualified per D29). Required slot; may be [].

required-adapter-bindings.description: Adapter kinds the specialist needs bound in the workspace (D19). Required slot; may be []. Items reference adapter ids by their canonical fully-qualified form.

required-substrate-capabilities.description: Substrate capabilities the specialist needs (D19). Typically includes 'skills'; may include 'event-streaming' if the specialist subscribes to events. Required slot; may be [].

declared-event-emissions.description: Events the specialist produces (D19; parallel to adapter D16). Required slot; may be [].

declared-event-subscriptions.description: Events the specialist reacts to (D19). Specialist-flavored: specialists react via skill invocation; adapters react via external interaction. Required slot; may be [].

activation-scope.description: Optional scope conditions under which the specialist is active (D19). Absent = always-active when bound. Detail of scope-expression syntax = layer-3 follow-on.
